title: digitalis laevigata
intro: Digitalis laevigata, also known as the smooth foxglove or digitalis purpurea var. laevigata, is a perennial plant in the foxglove family (Scrophulariaceae) that is native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to increase the force of the heartbeat and improve cardiac function. The health benefits of Digitalis laevigata include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce symptoms of heart failure, and alleviate certain arrhythmias. Digitalis laevigata is typically prepared for medicinal use through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which are often combined with other herbs to enhance its effects.
